original_image_tags: A dark document page with two punched holes on the left side. The page contains a short paragraph of white text at the top and the single word "RESTRICTED" stamped in large, faded, block letters near the bottom center. The page appears aged and has minor specks and imperfections. A small, illegible number (possibly "27") is in the bottom right corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a single 'RESTRICTED' stamp and the general page layout, with no contradictions on visual content.
